title: AVio signs as incubation partner; Jeroen Gerritsen named CMO
content_html:
Two updates from Cryptool ahead of the platform launch.

AVio signs on as incubation partner. From January, AVio will work with Cryptool as an incubation and advisory partner for projects fundraising on the platform. AVio brings a portfolio of early-stage crypto experience that will raise the quality bar for everything in the Cryptool pipeline.

Jeroen Gerritsen joins as Chief Marketing Officer. Jeroen comes in with a background spanning commerce, IT and data analysis. He takes over marketing, community management, market research and the official social channels with immediate effect.

Both moves are part of getting the platform launch and the public ambassador programme ready to ship.
author: Cryptool
